mapper.select:
select id, table_code, table_name, table_comment, owner_department_id, storage_datasource, auto_create_table, auto_add_column, ddl_status, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from result_table_config
and status = #{status}
and (table_code like #{keywordLike} or table_name like #{keywordLike} or table_comment like #{keywordLike})
order by updated_at desc, table_code asc

select id, table_code, table_name, table_comment, owner_department_id, storage_datasource, auto_create_table, auto_add_column, ddl_status, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from result_table_config where table_code = #{tableCode}

select id, result_table_id, column_name, column_name_cn, db_type, type_params, field_length, field_precision, field_scale, required, default_value, validation_rule, sort_no, enabled, created_at, updated_at from result_table_column_config where result_table_id = #{resultTableId} and enabled = '1' order by sort_no asc, column_name asc
mapper.update: update result_table_config set table_name = #{tableName}, table_comment = #{tableComment}, owner_department_id = #{ownerDepartmentId}, storage_datasource = #{storageDatasource}, auto_create_table = #{autoCreateTable}, auto_add_column = #{autoAddColumn}, ddl_status = #{ddlStatus}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
